title: leonurus manshuricus
intro: Leonurus manshuricus, also known as Korean motherwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and vasodilatory effects. The health benefits of Leonurus manshuricus include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with premenstrual syndrome. Herbal preparations of Leonurus manshuricus can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
